hero.name: Bhuvanesh
hero.role: Senior Full Stack Engineer & Backend Architect
hero.tagline: Building {scalable distributed systems}, {high-performance backends}, and {production-ready web & mobile applications}
hero.description: Full Stack Engineer with deep expertise in {backend architecture}, {real-time systems}, {cloud infrastructure}, and {mobile app deployment}. Passionate about open-source, clean code, and designing systems that scale reliably.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I am a {Senior Full Stack Engineer} with over {4+ years of experience} designing and delivering scalable, high-performance web and mobile applications. My core strength lies in {backend engineering}, where I architect robust systems using {Node.js}, {NestJS}, {Express.js}, and {Laravel}.

I specialize in building {real-time applications}, distributed systems, and scalable APIs using {WebSockets}, {Redis}, and {microservices architecture}. My systems are designed with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and long-term scalability.
On the frontend, I build enterprise-grade applications using {Angular} and {TypeScript}, ensuring clean component architecture, state management efficiency, and optimal rendering performance.

I am also a {Mobile Application Developer}, building cross-platform applications using {Ionic + Angular} and {Flutter}. I have successfully deployed multiple production applications to the {Google Play Store} and {Apple App Store}.
Beyond development, I manage {cloud infrastructure} and production deployments using {AWS} and {DigitalOcean}, configuring servers, databases, SSL, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring systems.

As an aspiring {Open Source Contributor}, I actively build developer tools, contribute to the ecosystem, and focus on creating reusable, well-architected solutions that benefit the broader developer community.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Leading development of real-time backend systems using {Node.js}, {Express}, {Redis}, and {WebSockets} to handle high-throughput data streaming and live updates.
Designed and managed {microservices-based architecture} with shared internal libraries, enabling independent service deployment and improved scalability.
Refactored monolithic services into scalable, independent services, improving system performance by 40% and reducing deployment time by 60%.
Collaborated on system design, API contracts, and deployment workflows, establishing best practices for code quality and maintainability.
Mentored junior developers on {clean architecture}, backend patterns, and code quality, conducting regular code reviews and knowledge sharing sessions.
Optimized database queries and implemented caching strategies using {Redis}, reducing API response times by 50%.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built responsive, mobile-first applications using {Angular} and {TypeScript}, implementing reusable UI components and following component-based architecture principles.
Developed secure, scalable {REST APIs} using {NestJS} and {Express.js}, implementing authentication, authorization, and input validation.
Implemented {WebSocket-based real-time data streaming} for dashboards and live views, enabling instant updates and improved user experience.
Coordinated QA and release cycles to ensure stable production deployments, establishing CI/CD pipelines and automated testing workflows.
Optimized frontend performance by implementing lazy loading, code splitting, and efficient state management, reducing initial load time by 35%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, design solutions, and deliver features on time and within scope.

jobs.title: Web Developer
highlights: Developed mobile-responsive {Angular applications} and reusable UI components, following Material Design principles and accessibility standards.
Built real-time UI dashboards with live data visualization, implementing {WebSocket} connections for instant data updates.
Improved frontend performance through code optimization, image compression, and efficient rendering techniques, enhancing user experience.
Implemented responsive design patterns ensuring seamless experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Collaborated with designers and backend developers to implement pixel-perfect UI components and integrate {RESTful APIs}.
Participated in code reviews, bug fixes, and feature development, contributing to team knowledge sharing and best practices.

projects.name: npm-warden
projects.description: A production-ready {CLI tool} built with {Node.js} and {TypeScript} that audits npm dependencies for {security vulnerabilities}, outdated packages, and maintenance risks. Designed to improve dependency health and developer productivity.

contact.heading: Let's Build Scalable Systems Together
contact.subheading: Open to senior engineering roles, backend architecture opportunities, remote positions, and impactful open-source collaborations.

items.title: Angular – The Complete Guide
items.description: Comprehensive certification covering {Angular} framework fundamentals, advanced concepts, {TypeScript}, {RxJS}, forms, HTTP, routing, and deployment strategies.
